# wSVID

**Instance Property**

The standard or vendor ID.

## Declaration

```swift
uint16_t wSVID;
```

## Getting the Properties

- **bAltenateMode**: The index of the alternative mode.
- **iAlternateModeString**: The index of the string descriptor describing the protocol.
